expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint distinguishes hyperlink styling, contextual navigation behavior, and fallback rendering safety
expectations.evidence: result.md states the required focus items but concludes they are not demonstrably covered due to missing phase5b artifacts: "There is no phase5b output artifact evidence ... to verify that the orchestrator/skill produced a Phase 5b checkpoint review that distinguishes these behaviors" and "The other required focus items (contextual navigation behavior, fallback rendering safety) cannot be confirmed without the Phase 5b audit/delta and updated draft." Therefore explicit coverage is not evidenced in outputs.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md indicate phase5b alignment cannot be confirmed because required phase5b deliverables are absent: "No Phase 5b run artifacts were provided" and "None are present in the benchmark evidence, so phase5b alignment cannot be confirmed."
